major_mechanics.name: Arm Breaks
major_mechanics.when: Occurs during each damage phase when the boss exposes its arms.
major_mechanics.watch_for: The Amalgamate raises its arms and glowing weak points appear on each one.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Split into left and right groups, break both arms quickly to expose the core.
major_mechanics.failure: If arms are not broken in time, the phase ends early and the fight drags on.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Groups unevenly split; players attacking the wrong arm; ignoring add pressure.

major_mechanics.name: Conjured Shields
major_mechanics.when: Spawn during the arm phases and before core exposure.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Floating shields appear around the arena with glowing protective barriers.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Break the shields quickly to prevent them from blocking damage to arms or the core.
major_mechanics.failure: Shields block critical damage windows, causing phase failures.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players tunneling the boss; ignoring shield spawns; poor target prioritization.

major_mechanics.name: Orb Delivery
major_mechanics.when: Occurs during each core phase after both arms are broken.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Orbs dropping from the sky and glowing collection points on the platform.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Pick up orbs and deliver them to the designated spots to weaken the boss.
major_mechanics.failure: Insufficient orb deliveries result in a shortened or failed burn phase.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players dropping orbs; multiple players grabbing the same orb; inefficient routing.

major_mechanics.name: Bubble Pulls
major_mechanics.when: Occurs throughout the fight, especially during high-pressure phases.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Large water bubbles forming around players and pulling them inward.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Dodge or move out of the bubble radius before being pulled in.
major_mechanics.failure: Being pulled into a bubble can immobilize players and lead to lethal follow-up damage.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players dodging too late; stacking too tightly; ignoring bubble spawn points.

major_mechanics.name: Platform Drops
major_mechanics.when: Happens during the final phase as the arena begins to collapse.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Platforms glowing red and shaking before falling away.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move quickly to safe platforms while maintaining DPS on the active boss.
major_mechanics.failure: Falling results in instant death and reduces group DPS significantly.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players waiting too long; misjudging jump distances; splitting from the group.

major_mechanics.name: Tidal Waves
major_mechanics.when: Triggered by Kenut at regular intervals.
major_mechanics.watch_for: A massive wave forming behind Kenut and sweeping across the arena.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Dodge through the wave or move to a safe zone to avoid heavy damage.
major_mechanics.failure: Being hit by the wave deals massive damage and can knock players off platforms.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players dodging too early; standing behind Kenut; ignoring wave direction.

major_mechanics.name: Elemental Essences
major_mechanics.when: Occurs during each pylon phase as players defeat elemental creatures.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Essences dropping from defeated elementals and glowing with their respective colors.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Collect essences and deliver them to pylons to empower them and progress the fight.
major_mechanics.failure: Insufficient essence delivery prolongs the phase and increases arena pressure.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players forgetting to pick up essences; delivering to the wrong pylon; poor routing.

major_mechanics.name: Pylon Control
major_mechanics.when: Active throughout the encounter during each pylon phase.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Pylons activating with beams connecting them to Qadim.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Assign players to each pylon to maintain control and prevent Qadim from gaining strength.
major_mechanics.failure: Losing control of pylons causes Qadim to gain stacks and deal more damage.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players leaving pylons unattended; insufficient CC on pylon adds; poor communication.

major_mechanics.name: Wyvern and Hydra Adds
major_mechanics.when: Spawn during each pylon phase and during transitions.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Large wyverns and hydras entering the arena with distinct animations.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Kill these adds quickly to reduce arena pressure and prevent lethal attacks.
major_mechanics.failure: Unmanaged adds overwhelm the group with AoEs and heavy damage.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players tunneling Qadim; ignoring add mechanics; poor positioning.
